topic: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I eat rice. I am eating rice. I have eaten rice. I have been eating rice for an hour. I ate rice.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I was eating rice. I had eaten rice. I had been eating rice for an hour. I will eat rice. I will be eating rice.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मैं चावल खा चुका होऊँगा।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I have been eating rice for an hour yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have been eating rice for an hour.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Tenses Part 4 — Mixed Tense Practice (All 12 Tenses) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She works. She is working. She has worked. She has been working for two hours.
